tasks.title: Re-scrape + re-score LIVE maadanim — EV-029 fat-parser bug collapsed fat on 88/200 products (latent grade impact)
tasks.summary: The EV-029 / TASK-142A blast-radius audit confirmed LIVE maadanim is AFFECTED by the shared Shufersal BSIP0 nutrition-parse bug: the trans-fat row ("שומן טראנס פחות מ-0.5") was captured as TOTAL fat -> fat_g=0.5 on 88/200 products, and saturated fat was never captured (0% across the corpus). Fat feeds the score engine (fat_quality uniformly neutralized to 50; also feeds fat_pct_of_kcal / hp_fat_*), so the LIVE maadanim grades carry latent error. The parser is already fixed (TASK-142A) and wired into shufersal_maadanim/01_scrape_maadanim.py. Re-scrape on the fixed parser -> re-build BSIP1 -> re-score -> QA -> diff vs live -> Product/Nutrition sign-off before any LIVE score swap.

cc_comments.text: 3 maadanim insight/comparison lines were neutralized inline (false point-gaps + 'lowest score' position from the old corrupted scores). Substance kept; Content should author proper replacements when convenient.

tasks.title: Re-scrape + re-score LIVE hummus — EV-029 fat-parser bug collapsed fat on 59/69 products (max fat 5.9g)
tasks.summary: The EV-029 / TASK-142A blast-radius audit confirmed LIVE hummus is AFFECTED by the shared Shufersal BSIP0 nutrition-parse bug (same defect first seen in the TASK-039 hummus audit, which patched downstream but not the shared parser): the trans-fat row was captured as TOTAL fat -> fat_g=0.5 on 59/69 products, with the whole corpus capping at max fat 5.9g (implausible for tahini-based spreads) and 0% saturated captured. Fat feeds the score engine, so the LIVE hummus grades carry latent error. The parser is fixed (TASK-142A) and wired into shufersal_hummus/02_scrape_hummus_shufersal.py. Re-scrape -> re-build BSIP1 -> re-score -> QA -> diff vs live -> Product/Nutrition sign-off before any LIVE score swap.

cc_comments.text: Before CLOSE: the TASK-039 fat register is now stale (report-only, did NOT affect scores) — regenerate or retire it so the batch summary stops emitting the false 'fat_quality from incorrect fat_g' warning.
Featured-hummus card had 3 hardcoded lines hand-fixed (A-count 1→5, gap 37→47, 'fat not shown'→now shown). Frontend/Content should confirm the new copy reads well.

tasks.title: Harden _shared BSIP0 scrape path: persist raw nutritionList source (rows + HTML) for offline replay of future parser fixes
tasks.summary: EV-029 (TASK-142A) showed the Shufersal BSIP0 scrapers persisted only the parser's reduced *_raw fields, not the source div.nutritionList — so when the trans-as-total-fat parser bug was fixed, the true fat/ saturated values were unrecoverable from disk (saturated 0% captured; fat collapsed to 0.5) and a fresh NETWORK re-scrape was the only way to recover them. This hardens the shared scrape path so every scrape persists the raw nutrition source, making any FUTURE parser fix a free OFFLINE re-parse. Landed BEFORE the TASK-149/150 live re-scrapes so those runs capture the raw source going forward.

decisions.title: Bari Launch Definition v1
options: Ratify Launch Definition v1 (5 gen1 categories on v2 + amendments A/B)
decisions.recommendation: Ratify (TASK-126). Establishes a fixed, testable launch finish line so P1-P5 cannot creep.
decisions.decision: Ratify Launch Definition v1. LAUNCH = Operational Readiness (5 gen1 categories - maadanim, hummus, snacks, yogurts, bread - LIVE on v2, score-frozen, field-complete; methodology page; >=1 flagship article; v2 Phase 1+2; confidence gate passing; validate-corpus green; fresh mobile+lg QA baselines; 0 P0/P1; dashboard GREEN) AND Market-Facing Readiness (comparison pages publicly available + indexable; first flagship article published; 5/5 category coverage; user-feedback collection active; SEO baseline live; analytics active). Amendment A: milk launches LEGACY-labelled (double migration gen0->gen1->v2 is disproportionate for a 20-product non-shelf editorial corpus) with a COMMITTED post-launch migration (P1 sub-task 128E), not optional. Amendment B: Launch Success Indicators (market-facing, section 6.5) added. NOT gating launch: Wave 2, base_pct, BSIP2 next-gen, all 3 articles, milk v2.
decisions.notes: Full definition: C:/Bari/launch_definition_v1.md. Roadmap: C:/Bari/bari_objective_roadmap_v1.md. P1-P5 success criteria inherit the launch dimension each objective owns (launch_definition_v1.md section 8).

decisions.title: BSIP2 TASK-133 revision calibration & scope sign-off (F2/F1/F4)
decisions.decision: Option A approved, and calibration magnitudes RATIFIED against real corpora (owner authorized proceeding through Phase E 2026-06-01). G1 magnitudes: F2 reconstructed x0.80 (conservative band-aware matrix discount; with the existing source-factor lands the effective protein-quality near the lower-middle of the empirical 47-81% DIAAS band) and collagen x0.55 (lowest matrix DIAAS, incomplete AA profile); F1 emulsifier/starch deltas = NEUTRAL/0 (calibration finding: the live EV-003 sprint1 tiering already realizes F1's directions - carrageenan/CMC penalized, lecithin-only carries NO emulsifier penalty so it is NOT over-penalized in proto_v0, native vs modified starch already differentiated by the regexes; the taxonomy adds exact identity for future tuning but no additional delta is warranted, avoiding cross-category destabilization and double-count); F4 BHA = -5 (small named penalty on additive_quality, BHT excluded). G2: F2 quality-only (implemented). G3: proto_v0 is source-of-truth; methodology.md weights re-synced at Phase E. Evidence: cross-corpora before/after (464 products, 7 corpora) -> 4 changed, 0 grade-flips; golden 11 PASS/1 pre-existing WARN/0 FAIL with no golden score changed.
options: A - Approve recommended package: build the structure now and defer numeric magnitudes (F2 discount curve, F1 penalty deltas, F4 penalty size) to a calibration run against real corpora; F2 discounts the Protein Quality dimension only; treat proto_v0 as source-of-truth and re-sync the frozen spec at Phase E
B - Approve build but fix calibration magnitudes up front before coding
C - Changes requested to scope before build proceeds
decisions.recommendation: Option A. Three gates not derivable from architecture: (G1) calibration magnitudes - 47-81% DIAAS is a band not a per-product number; constants.py states calibration is a separate phase, so build structure now and set numbers in a calibration run. (G2) F2 scope - discount the protein-QUALITY contribution only, leaving protein mass feeding satiety/nutrient-density (recommended). (G3) spec reconciliation - prototype has drifted from frozen spec (code: protein_quality 0.10, additive 0.10, processing 0.15; methodology.md says 9/7/18%); recommend proto_v0 as source-of-truth with a Phase-E spec re-sync. Directly affects F2's effective impact via protein weight.
decisions.notes: Does NOT block starting 133A (taxonomy) or the structural build of B/C/D - only the calibrated magnitudes and final closure. Full plan: C:/Bari/research/TASK-133_implementation_roadmap.md. Origin: TASK-132 evaluation. UPDATE 2026-06-01: 133A CLOSED; structural build of B/C/D COMPLETE and validated (report: C:/Bari/research/TASK-133BCD_validation_report.md). Golden 11 PASS/1 pre-existing WARN/0 FAIL (no golden score changed); cross-corpora 464 products -> 4 changed, 0 grade-flips (yogurt/milk/bread/hummus = 0). F4 FDA gate PASSED (BHA under active reassessment since 2026-02-10, no final rule landed; BHT not yet under reassessment -> differentiated). REMAINING for this decision: (G1) set placeholder magnitudes via a dedicated calibration run - F2 placeholders reconstructed x0.80 / collagen x0.55, F1 deltas NEUTRAL/no-op (must reconcile-retire the live EV-003 sprint1 nudges in the same run to avoid double-count), F4 BHA -5; (G2) F2 scope = quality-only (implemented as recommended); (G3) proto_v0 as source-of-truth + Phase-E spec re-sync. NOTE: F2 currently touches exactly one LIVE-corpus product (a maadanim soy-protein bar, no grade flip) - magnitudes must be ratified before any frontend rescore. 133B/C/D proposed status: BLOCKED on this decision.

decisions.title: Yogurts manual-MVP score provenance exception
options: A - Accept the 13 hand-tuned scores as a disclosed, non-authoritative MVP provenance exception + queue a real reproducible run as a deferred, non-blocking follow-up
B - Block yogurts (NO-GO) until a real frozen run reconciles the displayed scores
C - Reconcile to run_yogurt_001 (the existing machine run)
decisions.recommendation: Option A. run_yogurt_001 is a synthetic architectural-stress corpus (placeholder barcodes 7290200000001-045, proto_v0, generic archetype names) - it is not the real branded SKUs the frontend ships, so it cannot reconcile. Yogurts is already LIVE on the manual scores, so this is governance debt, not a launch gate. Govern the debt explicitly now; retire it with a real run later without blocking.
decisions.decision: Accept the 13 hand-tuned yogurt scores (yogurts_frontend_v1.json, v1-mvp-manual) as a disclosed, non-authoritative MVP provenance exception. Mark the corpus _meta authoritative:false + provenance:manual-mvp + exception:DEC-005 (disclosure, not a score change). Real reproducible scores are a COMMITTED but non-blocking follow-up via a real-product run (run_yogurt_002), opened when picked up. Yogurts remains LIVE.
decisions.notes: Supersedes the 2026-06-01 'reconcile to machine run' decision - run_yogurt_001 found synthetic (TASK-129B return). Real follow-up tracked as TASK-135 (run_yogurt_002), opened deferred/non-blocking per the 128E (DEC-003 Amendment A) precedent. Provenance marker on yogurts frontend _meta is the closeout action for 129B.
decisions.retirement_note: Manual-MVP yogurt shelf (yogurts_frontend_v1.json, 13 hand-tuned A-heavy products) replaced LIVE 2026-06-02 by the calibrated machine shelf yogurts_frontend_v2.json (run_yogurt_004, engine proto_v0/0.4.0 UNMODIFIED): 11 dairy products, B-capped (max 79/B displayed, zero A) - downward correction confirmed and accepted by Product (3a). Soy/coconut rows dropped + deferred to a dedicated plant run per the 3a ruling. Importers repointed v1->v2 (page-data + shelf-filters); prologue re-authored to the B-capped shelf and dairy-free lens retired (3b); tsc --noEmit clean; validate-corpus 0 errors; next build green (/hashvaot/yogurts prerendered). Provenance exception CLOSED - the live shelf is now reproducible and authoritative. v1 JSON kept (orphaned) for rollback.
